title: Profile entitlement columns can be self-updated in admin-schema deployments without the later column grant hardening

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Adds privileged entitlement columns without local column-level authenticated write restrictions.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint_control
affected_locations.detail: Owner update policy constrains rows but not privileged columns.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint_control
affected_locations.detail: Owner update policy keeps row-only shape.

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: has_pro_access() trusts the same entitlement fields.

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: Later migration is counterevidence and required deployment-state validation.

impact: Potential authenticated self-upgrade to Pro entitlement and access to Pro-gated features/server work where column hardening is not effective.
merge_notes: Only one raw candidate for this root cause in worker-03 output. No merge performed.
